danger_signals.visual_form: Patrol car sprite passes across screen
danger_signals.meaning: Fight interruption; fighters must reset positions or face consequences

danger_signals.visual_form: Fighter position near left or right boundary of play area
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent knockoff; loss of current round if pushed further

danger_signals.visual_form: Character visual state change to vulnerable stance
danger_signals.meaning: Loss of damage mitigation; all incoming attacks deal maximum knockback

danger_signals.visual_form: Open manhole sprite materializes on street behind losing fighter
danger_signals.meaning: Final round danger; being pushed into manhole results in match loss

danger_signals.visual_form: Pot sprite descends from building window into play area
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental hazard; temporary stun and damage if struck

danger_signals.visual_form: Time counter reaches zero on HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Police arrest of fighter closest to screen edge; round loss

safety_signals.visual_form: Fighter sprite location in middle of sidewalk play area
safety_signals.meaning: Maximum distance from knockout; safest tactical position

safety_signals.visual_form: Fighter stamina meter in upper ranges
safety_signals.meaning: Sustained defensive capability; can absorb damage and maintain block stance

safety_signals.visual_form: Symbol appears in bottom corner; opponent falls into manhole with confetti celebration from window
safety_signals.meaning: Round won; progresses match toward overall victory

safety_signals.visual_form: Fighter sprite with arms positioned high or low depending on defensive mode
safety_signals.meaning: Active damage mitigation; blocking incoming attacks

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Patrol car traversal of street; arrests fighters exceeding time limits

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Woman figure in window; flower pot thrower
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Window-based confetti celebration for victor; flower pot hazard; environmental stage setting

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Both fighters in neutral combat stance; full mobility; strong punch execution available
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Fighters maintain distance; deliberate attack patterns; block/counter opportunities frequent

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Fighters show wear; stamina meters visibly reduced; combat intensity escalates
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: More aggressive engagement; risky attack patterns; reduced defensive effectiveness

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Vulnerable fighter visual state changes; all knockback attacks equal in effect
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Affected fighter becomes easy to push; position rapidly deteriorates toward screen edge

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Sewer manhole sprite visible on street behind retreating fighter
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Losing fighter avoids manhole; winning fighter attempts pushing maneuver; heightened desperation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Timer display approaching expiration; patrol car may be visible entering scene
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Fighters either retreat or escalate; risk-aware positioning shifts; time pressure manifest

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Scene shifts to new city block location; fighters reset to starting positions
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Combat interrupts; fresh engagement begins with reset stamina

environmental_storytelling.example: Each consecutive round takes place on a different city block, suggesting geographic progression through neighborhood
Woman in window celebrates victor with confetti shower, establishing audience/spectator context for street fighting
Flower pots dropped from windows imply residential building usage; environmental danger reflects urban sidewalk reality
Patrol car interruptions establish implicit illegality of street fighting; police presence as constant threat to combatants
Manhole appearance in final rounds suggests underground urban infrastructure; knockout literally into city infrastructure

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Advances toward opponent; launches attacks to push enemy toward screen edge
Retreats toward center; defensive stance priority; attempts to maintain distance from edge
Becomes vulnerable; increased knockback distance per attack; rapid screen edge approach
Mirrors player attack/defense patterns; alternates weak/strong punch strategies; blocks high or low reactively
Pursues player toward screen edge; escalates attack frequency; maintains offensive pressure
Interrupts fight; forces both fighters to reset starting positions; creates tactical reset window

notes: Urban Champion employs minimal but effective visual communication of danger and world-state through screen-space positioning, stamina visualization, and environmental hazard manifestation. The game communicates political situation (illegal street fighting under police surveillance) through patrol car mechanic and law enforcement as periodic threat. Faction identity is suggested through environmental NPCs (woman spectator, implied police authority) rather than explicit allegiance systems. World-state transitions are communicated primarily through spatial progression (block-to-block advancement) and stamina depletion visual feedback. The sewer manhole serves as escalation indicator for match-critical moments.
